name: LOXTR - AI-Powered Global Trade Intelligence
description: LOXTR helps exporters, importers, and distributors digitize and optimize their entire global trade workflow with AI-powered customs compliance, lead generation, freight forecasting, and CRM.
capabilities: AI customs document analysis with HS code classification and tariff calculation
B2B buyer discovery with AI confidence scoring and web verification
Container freight rate forecasting with 6-month predictions and confidence intervals
Trade-specific CRM with AI email generation in any language
Multi-step campaign automation for export sales outreach
Supply chain intelligence and competitive analysis per lead

services.name: LoxConvert - AI Customs Document Analyzer
services.description: Upload commercial invoices, packing lists, or bills of lading in any format. AI extracts structured data, classifies HS codes, calculates tariff rates, and flags compliance risks.

services.name: AI Lead Radar - B2B Buyer Discovery
services.description: AI-powered multi-step discovery wizard that finds and verifies real potential buyer companies based on your specific product and target markets.

services.name: LOX Predict - Freight Rate Forecasting
services.description: 6-month container shipping rate forecasts with confidence intervals, trend analysis, multi-carrier route optimization, and AI-generated market insights.

services.name: LOXTR CRM - Trade Sales Automation
services.description: Purpose-built CRM for international trade featuring lead management, AI email generation, campaign automation, smart segments, and supply chain intelligence.
